provenance.metric: Share of consumers with FICO >= 670 (prime+), by state — STATE-ADJUSTED DERIVED ESTIMATE (not a directly-published Experian figure).
primary_sources: Experian — average FICO score by state, September 2025 data, published 2026-03-30 (national average 713).
U.S. Census Bureau — median household income by state, 2024, via FRED.
provenance.derivation: The national FICO band distribution (Poor 14.7% / Fair 14.9% / Good 20.1% / Very Good 27.5% / Exceptional 22.8%; national avg 713) is shifted by each state's average-score differential vs. the 713 national average and interpolated within bands to estimate the share at/above FICO 670. This is a disclosed, reproducible APPROXIMATION — labelled a state-adjusted derived estimate, NOT a directly-published Experian per-state >=670 share. Range 60.1% (MS) to 75.0% (MN).
